titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chairman of the American Delegation to the Seventh International Conference of American States ( (Hull))

div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chairman of the American Delegation to the Seventh International Conference of American States ( Hull )Mr. Hull was aboard the S. S. American Legion, at sea.
div.p: 15. The Spanish Chargé d’Affaires, under instructions, inquired yesterday whether there would be any objection on our part to the presence of a Spanish observer at the Montevideo Conference.

In reply I referred him to the regulations limiting Pan American Conferences to representatives of Latin American States, etc., and said that, personally in the circumstances, I did not feel that it was proper for the United States to take any individual position in the matter. I added that, inasmuch as you are about to arrive at Montevideo, his Government would naturally desire to approach you direct, should they care to pursue the inquiry any further.
